mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_media_analysis (interview_session_id, question_id, answer_id, kind, transcript, metrics, score, score_detail) VALUES (#{interviewSessionId}, #{questionId}, #{answerId}, #{kind}, #{transcript}, #{metrics}, #{score}, #{scoreDetail}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), question_id = VALUES(question_id), transcript = VALUES(transcript), metrics = VALUES(metrics), score = VALUES(score), score_detail = VALUES(score_detail), created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM interview_media_analysis WHERE interview_session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id DESC
